results.compiled_code:
SELECT
    reinterpretAsUInt64(MD5(concat(rel.parent_id, rel.child_id, vuln._dlt_parent_id))) as scan_id,
    toYYYYMMDD(parseDateTime64BestEffort(rel.detected_at)) as date_id,
    toUUID(rel.parent_id) as repo_id,
    dep.unique_id as dependency_key,
    adv.advisory_id,
    adv.severity_label,
    adv.cvss__score as severity_score,
    1 as is_vulnerable,
    if(vuln.first_patched_version IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) as has_patch,
    parseDateTime64BestEffort(rel.detected_at) as detected_at
FROM `default`.`silver_dependency_relations` rel
JOIN `default`.`dim_dependency` dep
    ON rel.child_id = toString(dep.dependency_id)
    AND (rel.version = dep.version OR (rel.version IS NULL AND dep.version IS NULL))
JOIN `default`.`silver_github_advisories_vulnerabilities` vuln
    ON dep.name = vuln.package__name
    AND (
        dep.ecosystem = vuln.package__ecosystem
        OR (dep.ecosystem = 'pypi'         AND vuln.package__ecosystem = 'pip')
        OR (dep.ecosystem = 'packagist'    AND vuln.package__ecosystem = 'composer')
        OR (dep.ecosystem = 'githubactions' AND vuln.package__ecosystem = 'actions')
    )
JOIN `default`.`dim_advisory` adv ON vuln._dlt_parent_id = adv.internal_id
